---
title: "18 Merge Rankings"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
 # Intent: combine stock and dividend rankings into one master table.
      # Buggy join: merge without explicit key may duplicate unexpectedly.
  master_rankings <-merge(stock_rank, div_rank, all = TRUE)

      # Intent: derive overall score and rank.
 master_rankings<- master_rankings  %>%
   mutate(overall_score = composite_stock_score + div_score) %>%
  arrange(desc(overall_score)) %>%
    mutate(overall_rank= row_number())

      # Intent: inspect merged row count (should be close to number of symbols).
   nrow(master_rankings)
```

```{r}
 # Intent: keep a compact view for reporting.
   overall_table <- master_rankings %>%
  select(symbol,stock_rank,div_rank,overall_score,overall_rank,grade)

head(overall_table, 20)
```
